title: Mir Memory Entry Schema
description: Single memory record in the SoT (global/personal/project). Supports lifetime tracking, deprecation, and supersession.
$comment: R8  — CP family  (  /   /   /  )  : `type: project` + `tags: [cp-character, cp-style, cp-continuity, cp-worldbuild]` . `type: reference`   (Phase 8 GC default 30  — CP    ). example-story  per-agent memory  ADR-13 per-agent namespace   (`owner: <agent_slug>` ). Slice C WARN .

id.description: Kebab/snake-case slug. Globally unique within its SoT.

type.description: Memory category (see CLAUDE.md auto-memory types). incident is R4 addition for postmortem records.

status.description: Lifecycle status. critical=GC-immune, expired=valid_until passed, deprecated=do not inject.

superseded_by.description: id of the replacement entry. Required if status == superseded.

valid_until.description: ISO-8601 date after which the entry auto-becomes 'expired'. Absent == no expiry.

tags.description: Optional tags for filtering and selective injection.

sot.description: Which Source of Truth this entry belongs to. Same id may exist in different sot, but body must not duplicate.

updated.description: ISO-8601 UTC timestamp of last body change.

linked.description: Other memory entry ids this one references (cross-link, see CLAUDE.md auto-memory link syntax).
